channel.title: Jan Sandstorm
channel.description: Notes from the practice — literary fiction, comics, painting, music

item.title: Essay — What the Painting Wants To Become
item.description: Essay — What the Painting Wants To Become — March 2026 On discovering that defining the outcome in advance is the thing most likely to prevent it.

item.title: Jan Sandstorm Newsletter #4
item.description: Newsletter #4 — November 2025 A finished comic that almost didn't get finished. On the difference between studying a discipline and actually doing something with it.

item.title: Jan Sandstorm Newsletter #3
item.description: Newsletter #3 — June 2025 On how long Hergé and Glyn Dillon actually spent per page — and what that means for anyone who thinks they'll make a comic in a few weeks.

item.title: Jan Sandstorm Newsletter #2
item.description: Newsletter #2 — December 2024 Ten books read since September, a painting studio in autumn, and the question of why posting feels like it needs to earn its place.

item.title: Jan Sandstorm Newsletter #1
item.description: Newsletter #1 — September 2024 Three months after leaving a long career: a camper van, two university courses, a studio built, and the first attempt at a blog no algorithm will ever find.
